'''Ghaz Kul IV''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] town on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pitann]]. It was connected to one of Pitann's limited-service [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]] via [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] barge. The town was grimy and populated with industrial buildings. It was surrounded by slag heaps and open pit mines.

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the [[Pitann droid gladiatorial games|droid gladiatorial contests]] began in the town, prompting the construction of a specially built [[Droid gladiatorial arena|arena]] to hold the games.
